class.name: PlayFabLobbyConfig
class.brief_description: Configuration for creating a PlayFab lobby.
class.description: Passed to [method PlayFabMultiplayer.create_lobby_async]. Property dictionaries must use [String] keys and [String] values because they map directly to PlayFab Multiplayer lobby properties.

members.member: String properties indexed for lobby search. Visible to anyone who can discover the lobby through [code]find_lobbies_async[/code] for this lobby's [code]access_policy[/code] audience, and returned on [PlayFabLobbySummary]. Set at create time only and cannot be edited after the lobby exists. PlayFab search keys must use reserved names like [code]string_key1[/code] or [code]number_key1[/code]; they are the only keys that may appear in [code]find_lobbies_async[/code] filter expressions.
String properties visible only to lobby members. Hidden from [code]find_lobbies_async[/code] results. After create, update via [method PlayFabLobby.set_properties_async] (owner only).

Initial string properties for the creating member. Visible only to lobby members. After create, each member updates their own entry via [method PlayFabLobby.set_member_properties_async] — you cannot edit another member's properties.
When true, only the lobby owner can invite.
